stemHtml: Radio failure while taxiing. You see a steady red light, then a flashing green. What do they mean?

options.a: Red: Stop; Green: Return to apron.
options.b: Red: Stop; Green: Cleared to taxi.
options.c: Red: Taxi clear of runway; Green: Cleared to taxi.
options.d: Red: Taxi clear of runway; Green: Cleared for take-off.
